channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] How Personas Can Influence Agents to Play Split or Steal
item.description: Persona prompts significantly influenced LLM agent behavior in a Split or Steal game; cooperative personas dominated while analytical personas exploited more.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Benchmarking KV-Cache Optimizations across Task Quality and System Performance for Long-Context Serving
item.description: Benchmark of KV-cache compression techniques for language models shows compression ratio poorly predicts end-to-end performance; different methods suit different workloads.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Text Distance from Nested and Hierarchical Repetitions: A Compression-Based Perspective
item.description: Ladderpath, an Algorithmic Information Theory-based method for analyzing nested text structures, outperforms BERT and gzip in out-of-distribution and few-shot text classification tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Most LLM Conformity Needs No Speaker: Measuring the Speaker-Free Floor in Peer-Pressure Benchmarks
item.description: Study finds LLM conformity is driven by repeated text rather than speaker influence in peer-pressure benchmarks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] The yes-no bias of large language models reflects answer order and wording, not shifts in moral judgment
item.description: LLM yes-no bias on moral questions reflects answer order and wording effects, not underlying moral judgment shifts, with variation across models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Prompt Robustness Is Task-Dependent: Comparing Objective and Belief-Style Questions in LLM Evaluation
item.description: Prompt robustness in LLMs is task-dependent, showing significantly different response consistency patterns between objective and subjective questions.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] ResonatorLM: Causal Resonant Field Mixing for Efficient Long-Context Language Modelin
item.description: ResonatorLM replaces transformer attention with physics-based resonators to improve efficiency and accuracy in long-context language modeling.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Revisiting the Relation Between Language Model Perplexity and ASR Word Error Rate for Modern End-to-End Speech Recognition
item.description: Research examines the relationship between language model perplexity and speech recognition word error rate in modern end-to-end ASR systems.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] BaFCo: A Document Understanding Benchmark for Complex Bangla Form Comprehension
item.description: BaFCo benchmark dataset with 200 Bangla government forms reveals limitations of multimodal language models in comprehending low-resource-language documents.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] NAVER LABS System Re-implementation for the IWSLT 2026 Instruction-Following Task
item.description: NAVER LABS re-implemented their instruction-following system for IWSLT 2026 using SeamlessM4T-v2-large and Qwen3-4B-Instruct, achieving COMET 0.781 on EN-ZH speech translation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Population-Level Profiling of DSM-5 Depressive Symptoms Among Self-Reported ADHD and ASD Users on Twitter: An Exploratory Study Using Advanced NLP and Statistical Analysis
item.description: NLP analysis of 1.2M tweets from ADHD and ASD users reveals differences in depression symptom expression between groups.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Do It Right! A Methodology for Successful NLP System Development
item.description: A Systems Development Life Cycle framework is applied to NLP-based clinical data extraction from electronic medical records.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] RPAM: A Principled Metric for Evaluating Associations in Language Models with High Predictive Validity in Downstream Outputs
item.description: RPAM is an upstream metric for language models that correlates strongly with downstream biases and human-measured associations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] UCSC NLP at SemEval-2026 Task 10: Boundary-Aware Span Extraction and RoBERTa Classification for Conspiracy Detection
item.description: Boundary-aware span extraction and RoBERTa classification systems developed for conspiracy marker detection achieved 7th and 11th place rankings in SemEval-2026 Task 10.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Where to cut, how deep: BPE and Unigram-LM on chemistry SMILES
item.description: Researchers compared BPE and Unigram-LM tokenizers for chemistry SMILES, finding they build near-disjoint vocabularies with different segmentation depths.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] SpanUQ: Span-Level Uncertainty Quantification for Large Language Model Generation
item.description: SPANUQ introduces span-level uncertainty quantification for LLM outputs, achieving better accuracy than existing methods while running 10-20x faster.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Nemotron-Labs-Diffusion: A Tri-Mode Language Model Unifying Autoregressive, Diffusion, and Self-Speculation Decoding
item.description: Nemotron-Labs-Diffusion: A Tri-Mode Language Model Unifying Autoregressive, Diffusion, and Self-Speculation Decoding

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] When Should LLMs Search? Counterfactual Supervision for Search Routing
item.description: When Should LLMs Search? Counterfactual Supervision for Search Routing

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Inject or Navigate? Token-Efficient Retrieval for LLM Analysis of Transactional Legal Documents
item.description: Inject or Navigate? Token-Efficient Retrieval for LLM Analysis of Transactional Legal Documents

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] CoPiT: Cognitive Pivot Translation for Digraphic Low-Resource Mongolian in the Traditional Script
item.description: CoPiT: Cognitive Pivot Translation for Digraphic Low-Resource Mongolian in the Traditional Script

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Mitigating Factual Hallucination in Large Reasoning Models via Mixed-Mode Advantage Regularization
item.description: Mitigating Factual Hallucination in Large Reasoning Models via Mixed-Mode Advantage Regularization

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Is Domain Adaptation Always Helpful? A Frozen-Backbone Study of Cross-Domain Sentiment Transfer
item.description: Is Domain Adaptation Always Helpful? A Frozen-Backbone Study of Cross-Domain Sentiment Transfer

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Umm... With Transformers? Insights from Filled Pause Use across Four Slavic Parliaments
item.description: Umm... With Transformers? Insights from Filled Pause Use across Four Slavic Parliaments

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] InfluMatch: Frontier-Quality KOL Search at 4B-Model Cost
item.description: InfluMatch: Frontier-Quality KOL Search at 4B-Model Cost

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] MemDefrag: Latent Memory Defragmentation for Large Language Models
item.description: MemDefrag: Latent Memory Defragmentation for Large Language Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] PluraMath: Extending Mathematical Reasoning Evaluation Beyond High-Resource Languages
item.description: PluraMath: Extending Mathematical Reasoning Evaluation Beyond High-Resource Languages

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] From Blueprint to Reality: Modeling and Applying Putnam's Social Capital Theory with LLM-based Multi-agent Simulations
item.description: From Blueprint to Reality: Modeling and Applying Putnam's Social Capital Theory with LLM-based Multi-agent Simulations

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Measuring the practice of shared-decision making (OPTION12): An Investigation into Open-sourced Smaller LLMs (OS-sLLMs) for Better Privacy and Sustainability
item.description: Measuring the practice of shared-decision making (OPTION12): An Investigation into Open-sourced Smaller LLMs (OS-sLLMs) for Better Privacy and Sustainability

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] CurateEvo: Data-Curation Evolving for Agentic Post-Training
item.description: CurateEvo: Data-Curation Evolving for Agentic Post-Training

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Prompting Complexity: Shortest Prompts for Texts and Behaviors in LLMs
item.description: Prompting Complexity: Shortest Prompts for Texts and Behaviors in LLMs

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Statistically Meaningful Geometry and Gauge Symmetry Breaking: A Geometric Foundation for Scientific Discovery and Intelligence Emergence
item.description: Addresses whether over-parameterized systems show genuine intelligence, proposing differential geometry framework where gauge symmetry breaking enables discovery of causal laws.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Design-CP: Context Parallelism for Design of Protein Nanoparticles
item.description: Design-CP distributes protein nanoparticle design across multiple GPUs using context parallelism to overcome memory limits.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Geometry-Aware Infrastructure-Anchored Denoiser for UWB Sensing and Work-Zone Reconstruction
item.description: GAIA, a geometry-aware learning framework, improves ultra-wideband range denoising for work-zone reconstruction, reducing MSE by 18.4% and improving polygon IoU by 15.5%.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] The Granularity Paradox: How Temporal Disaggregation Inflates In-Sample Fit and Compounds Out-of-Sample Error
item.description: Benchmarking finds finer temporal disaggregation improves in-sample fit but degrades out-of-sample forecasting accuracy due to recursive error compounding.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Exogenous Dropout: A Simple, Strong Baseline for Corruption-Robust Time Series Forecasting with Covariates
item.description: Exogenous dropout training improves robustness of time series forecasters when external covariates are noisy, misaligned, or missing.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Empirical Minimal-Realisation Compression of Deep Neural Networks via Controllability-Observability Tests
item.description: Controllability-observability analysis compresses neural networks by identifying redundant hidden states, achieving 73% parameter reduction on MNIST with minimal accuracy loss.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Learning to Control LLM Agent Harnesses with Offline Reinforcement Learning
item.description: Researchers propose offline reinforcement learning to train a controller that optimizes LLM agent execution harnesses, improving verification and task quality across multiple benchmarks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] AdaStop: Cost-Aware Early Stopping for DNN Test Selection
item.description: AdaStop framework automatically stops DNN testing when marginal fault discovery rate falls below cost-benefit threshold, finding 65-84% of faults with 9-31% of labeling budget.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Learnable Weighting of Intra-Attribute Distances for Categorical Data Clustering with Nominal and Ordinal Attributes
item.description: Learnable Weighting of Intra-Attribute Distances for Categorical Data Clustering with Nominal and Ordinal Attributes

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Breaking Structural Isolation: Scalable Graph Clustering via Community-Aware Sampling and Structural Entropy
item.description: Breaking Structural Isolation: Scalable Graph Clustering via Community-Aware Sampling and Structural Entropy

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Parameter-Free Encoders Remain Viable for RDB Foundation Models
item.description: Parameter-Free Encoders Remain Viable for RDB Foundation Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] InvWeaver: Deductive Feedback for Invariant Synthesis in Interacting-Loop Programs
item.description: InvWeaver: Deductive Feedback for Invariant Synthesis in Interacting-Loop Programs

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] PatchOptic for Shared-State LLM Workflows with Projected Views and Verified Structured Updates
item.description: PatchOptic for Shared-State LLM Workflows with Projected Views and Verified Structured Updates

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] $\mathbf{\lambda}$-VAE: Variance Equalization for Posterior Collapse
item.description: $\mathbf{\lambda}$-VAE: Variance Equalization for Posterior Collapse

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Self-Review Reinforcement Learning (SRRL) with Cross-Episode Memory and Policy Distillation
item.description: Self-Review Reinforcement Learning (SRRL) with Cross-Episode Memory and Policy Distillation

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Federated Physics-Grounded Reinforcement Learning for Distributed Stability Control in Smart Grids
item.description: Federated Physics-Grounded Reinforcement Learning for Distributed Stability Control in Smart Grids

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] EquiFiLM: Charge-Conditioned Equivariant Force Fields via Feature-wise Linear Modulation
item.description: EquiFiLM: Charge-Conditioned Equivariant Force Fields via Feature-wise Linear Modulation

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] SafeImpute: Reliable Clinical Data Imputation via Conformal Selection
item.description: SafeImpute: Reliable Clinical Data Imputation via Conformal Selection

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Coin Flip Per Token: Bernoulli Sparse Steering of Large Language Models
item.description: A Coin Flip Per Token: Bernoulli Sparse Steering of Large Language Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Safe Bayesian Optimization with Counterfactual Policies
item.description: Safe Bayesian Optimization with Counterfactual Policies

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Intuitionistic Fuzzy Graph Embedded Random Vector Functional Link with Multiview Learning
item.description: Intuitionistic Fuzzy Graph Embedded Random Vector Functional Link with Multiview Learning

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Domain-Adaptive Climate Downscaling Under Temporal Distribution Shift
item.description: Domain-Adaptive Climate Downscaling Under Temporal Distribution Shift

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Orthogonal Dendritic Intrinsic Networks: An Architecture for Significance-Ordered, Orthogonal Latent Spaces
item.description: Orthogonal Dendritic Intrinsic Networks: An Architecture for Significance-Ordered, Orthogonal Latent Spaces

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Deep Reinforcement Learning for Dynamic Battery Management of Autonomous Order Pickers
item.description: Deep Reinforcement Learning for Dynamic Battery Management of Autonomous Order Pickers

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] LLM-Driven Neural Network Generation with Same-Family Architecture Guidance: Disentangling Transfer and Adaptation
item.description: LLM-Driven Neural Network Generation with Same-Family Architecture Guidance: Disentangling Transfer and Adaptation

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] FourTune: Towards Fully 4-Bit Efficient Post-Training for Diffusion Models
item.description: FourTune: Towards Fully 4-Bit Efficient Post-Training for Diffusion Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Low-Overhead Error-Corrected QCNNs Using Bivariate Bicycle Codes
item.description: Low-Overhead Error-Corrected QCNNs Using Bivariate Bicycle Codes

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Multimodal Molecular Representation Learning with Graph Neural Networks, Deep & Cross Networks, and SMILES Embeddings
item.description: Multimodal Molecular Representation Learning with Graph Neural Networks, Deep & Cross Networks, and SMILES Embeddings

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Two Sides of the Same Coin: Learning the Backdoor to Remove the Backdoor
item.description: Two Sides of the Same Coin: Learning the Backdoor to Remove the Backdoor

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Heckman-Corrected Epistemic Uncertainty: Selection on Unobservables Defeats Importance Weighting
item.description: Heckman-Corrected Epistemic Uncertainty: Selection on Unobservables Defeats Importance Weighting
